specs.title: cp-000: Citation nodes also support an overrides attribute that defaults to null
cp-001: Citation keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift-C dispatches scholarsynceditor-action with
cp-002: Citation chip hover waits 400 ms before opening the tooltip
cp-003: Citation chip click toggles the popover open state and suppresses the hover tool
cp-004: Citation chip fallback text is when a numeric citation has no assigned numbers
cp-005: Citation chip fallback text is when an author-year citation has no resolved refe
cp-006: Numeric citation chips compress consecutive numbers into ranges such as 1-3
cp-007: Citation popover View action opens the reference sidebar through the Zustand sto
cp-008: Citation popover Remove appears only when the citation node contains more than o
cp-009: Removing the final reference from a citation chip deletes the entire citation no
cp-010: Citation popover footer action label is Delete citation
cp-011: Citation numbering plugin debounces renumbering by 100 ms after editor updates
cp-012: Citation numbering assigns numbers on order of first appearance in the document
cp-013: Bibliography insert command refuses to insert a second bibliography node when on
cp-014: Empty bibliography node view text reads References will appear here when you add
cp-015: Bibliography node view heading label is References
cp-016: Bibliography view uses pre-formatted CSL bibliography entries when bibliographyE
cp-017: Bibliography view falls back to Vancouver-style text formatting when CSL bibliog
cp-018: Citation dialog default active tab is search every time the modal opens
cp-019: Citation dialog clears searchQuery selectedIds DOI state search results and sear
cp-020: Citation dialog focuses the search input shortly after opening via a 50 ms timeo
cp-021: Citation dialog closes on backdrop click
cp-022: Citation dialog closes on Escape
cp-023: Citation dialog header title is Insert Citation
cp-024: Citation dialog tab labels are Your References Library Paste DOIPMID and Manual
cp-025: Citation dialog search-input placeholder is Search references or paste DOIPMID
cp-026: Search queries starting with 10 or containing doiorg are treated as DOI identifi
cp-027: Search queries that are 1 to 8 digits only are treated as PMID identifiers
cp-028: Search-tab non-identifier PubMed search waits 350 ms after typing before request
cp-029: Search-tab PubMed request body includes query page 1 pageSize 10 and documentId
cp-030: Search-tab search spinner shows while the PubMed request is pending
cp-031: Search-tab error fallback string is PubMed search failed Please try again
cp-032: Search-tab empty state text is No PubMed or reference matches found when a typed
cp-033: Search-tab empty state text is No references yet Add one using DOIPMID or manual
cp-034: Search-tab empty state text is No matching references found when local reference
